AI Recruitment System
• Developed an AI-powered recruitment platform to automate candidate screening and shortlisting using machine learning
techniques.
• Implemented resume parsing and skill extraction using NLP to match candidates with job requirements.
• Designed a ranking algorithm to score candidates based on experience, skills, and relevance.
• Built an intuitive interface to streamline recruiter workflows and reduce hiring time.
• Improved efficiency of initial hiring stages by minimizing manual screening efforts.
Legal Team AI
• Built an AI-based legal assistant to support legal teams with document analysis and insights. • Integrated Natural
Language Processing (NLP) to extract key clauses and summarize legal documents.
• Developed features for legal query handling and automated response generation.
• Enhanced legal research efficiency by providing quick insights from large document datasets.
• Designed the system to reduce manual effort in contract review and documentation.
Endurance Estate Project
• Designed and developed a digital platform for Endurance Estate to manage property listings and client interactions
. • Created a user-friendly UI/UX prototype to improve customer engagement and accessibility.
• Implemented features for property browsing, filtering, and inquiry management.
• Focused on business digitalization, enabling efficient handling of real estate operations.
• Enhanced user experience through structured layouts and intuitive navigation design.
